title: Corn Creeper deals five times attack damage on first attack

card.rawText: Inflict 5x Atk damage during this card's first attack. This effect can only occur 1 time while this card is on the field.

plan.title: Corn Creeper deals five times attack damage on first attack
plan.summary: Verify Corn Creeper's first attack while on field multiplies its attack damage by 5.

notes: Corn Creeper has not attacked yet this field instance.

steps: Set Corn Creeper as player_1 primary and test defender as player_2 primary.
Resolve its first attack while on field.
Roll attack damage 3 and 3 plus modifier 2.

expectedAssertions.label: Final damage is multiplied by five

manualVerification: Repeat a second attack with the same field instance and confirm the 5x multiplier does not repeat.
riskNotes: This fixture covers the first-attack success path; one-per-field-instance consumption should get a separate negative fixture.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Corn Creeper first-attack damage multiplier.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
